description_long: This object is a tall, ornate structure resembling a classical stone lamppost, featuring a large, urn-shaped top adorned with intricate floral and vine motifs. The upper section is highly decorative, with sculpted garlands and reliefs, giving it a baroque or neoclassical appearance. The urn sits atop a robust, square pedestal base, which appears to be made of the same stone material and is slightly weathered, suggesting outdoor use. Some leafy elements, possibly sculpted or real foliage, are visible around the base, adding to its decorative appeal. The surface is predominantly a light gray stone, with areas of shadow and patina that enhance its antique look. There are no visible light fixtures or modern electrical components, and the object is solid and heavy, likely intended as a permanent fixture in a park or garden setting.
description: A tall, ornate stone lamppost with a large, urn-shaped top decorated with floral motifs, set on a square pedestal base and featuring classical decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the urn's detailed floral reliefs and leafy elements cascading from the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical handles and the full height of the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the ornate garlands and the weathered stone texture of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Rear view with more shadow, showing the urn's rounded back and additional leafy decorations at the base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Urn-shaped classical stone top with floral and vine reliefs, no visible lamp head or light fixture.
